name: Volvox Genome Navigation Tasks
description: Navigation tasks for the volvox test dataset

tasks.title: Navigate to ctgA:5,000-6,000
tasks.description: Use the search bar or pan/zoom to navigate to the region ctgA:5,000-6,000.

tasks.title: Zoom to base-pair resolution
tasks.description: Navigate to ctgA:1,000-1,100 and zoom in until you can see individual bases.
hints: Navigate to the region first, then zoom in with the scroll wheel

tasks.title: Find ctgB
tasks.description: Navigate to contig B. Make sure the region ctgB:1,000-3,000 is visible.
hints: ctgB is a different chromosome from ctgA

tasks.title: Quick check
tasks.description: What are the two contigs in the volvox genome? Select the correct answer.

tasks.title: Find the gene-dense region
tasks.description: Navigate to ctgA:15,000-20,000. This region has several annotated features.

tasks.title: Navigate to the end of ctgA
tasks.description: Navigate to the end of contig A (approximately ctgA:48,000-50,000).
hints: Try typing 'ctgA:48000-50000' in the search bar
